commands: echo '=== Step 1: Swap ===' && if ! swapon --show | grep -q swapfile; then fallocate -l 2G /swapfile && chmod 600 /swapfile && mkswap /swapfile && swapon /swapfile && echo '/swapfile swap swap defaults 0 0' >> /etc/fstab; fi && free -m
echo '=== Step 2: Pull ===' && cd /var/www/globalelectionnetwork && git pull origin master 2>&1
echo '=== Step 3: Install ===' && cd /var/www/globalelectionnetwork && npm ci --prefer-offline 2>&1 | tail -5

echo '=== Step 4: Build ===' && cd /var/www/globalelectionnetwork && export NODE_ENV=production DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5432 DB_USER=pakload DB_PASSWORD='Khan123@#' DB_NAME=elections NEXTAUTH_SECRET=GEN_election_secret_2026 NEXTAUTH_URL=https://globalelectionnetwork.com && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1536' npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20
echo '=== Step 5: PM2 ===' && cd /var/www/globalelectionnetwork && pm2 restart globalelection 2>&1 || pm2 start npm --name globalelection -- start -- -p 3000 2>&1 && pm2 save 2>&1

echo '=== Step 6: Seed ===' && sudo -u postgres psql -d elections -c "INSERT INTO posts (title,slug,content,excerpt,featured_image,author,category,status,published_at) SELECT 'UN Observers Arrive Ahead of By-Elections','un-observers-by-elections','

Full coverage of UN observer mission.

','UN observers arrive for by-election monitoring.','https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529107386315-e1a2ed48a620?w=1200&q=80','GEN Correspondent','Elections','published',NOW()-INTERVAL ''2 hours'' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM posts WHERE slug='un-observers-by-elections');" 2>&1
echo '=== Step 7: Health ===' && sleep 6 && pm2 list 2>&1 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP_%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000 && echo '' && echo DONE
